title: pelma latipes
intro: Pelma latipes, commonly known as Java tea or Java plume, is a type of flowering plant native to tropical regions. It has been used in traditional medicine for its health benefits, which include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. The therapeutic actions of Pelma latipes include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties, which contribute to its use in treating various health conditions. The bioactive constituents of Pelma latipes include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and terpenoids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties.
